text: Building an MCP server in C# 14 on .NET 11 with the official 1.2 SDK. [McpServerTool], stdio, and the stderr logging fix.
SearchValues<T> in .NET 11: precompute once into a static readonly field, then watch IndexOfAny become 5x to 250x faster across SIMD kernels.
jsonl-to-pdf turns Claude Code session JSONL into a PDF, sub-agents nested inline, --redact strips AWS/GitHub/Anthropic keys.
